context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements Bayesian-smoothed aggregate rating calculation and generates valid schema.org Product/AggregateRating JSON-LD markup for Google Search star ratings. Covers the ProductRatingSummary model, Bayesian formula specifics, and structured data output.

checklist.name: ProductRatingSummary model
checklist.description: Defines a data structure (type/interface/class) with both averageRating (Bayesian-smoothed) and rawAverageRating (simple mean) as separate fields

checklist.name: Distribution field
checklist.description: ProductRatingSummary includes a distribution field tracking count per star level (1 through 5)

checklist.name: Bayesian formula used
checklist.description: The rating calculation uses the formula (C * globalMean + sum_of_ratings) / (C + n), not a simple arithmetic mean

checklist.name: Confidence weight C=5
checklist.description: The Bayesian confidence weight C is set to 5 (not 1, 10, or another value)

checklist.name: Global mean used
checklist.description: The Bayesian formula incorporates a global average rating across all products, not a hardcoded fallback value

checklist.name: Rounding to 1 decimal
checklist.description: Both averageRating and rawAverageRating are rounded to 1 decimal place (e.g., Math.round(x * 10) / 10 or equivalent)

checklist.name: ratingValue format
checklist.description: aggregateRating.ratingValue is formatted to 1 decimal place (e.g., '4.3' not '4.333...' or 4)

checklist.name: bestRating and worstRating
checklist.description: aggregateRating includes bestRating set to '5' and worstRating set to '1'

checklist.name: Conditional AggregateRating
checklist.description: The aggregateRating block is omitted (not included) when reviewCount is 0

checklist.name: reviewCount in schema
checklist.description: aggregateRating.reviewCount reflects the actual number of approved reviews
